# Doc Status Report

**Report Date:** 2026-06-27 **Report Type:** Doc Status **Generated By:**
review-docs orchestration (one docs-curator agent per document)

## Executive Summary

Reviewed all 14 active folders under `docs/projects/`. **7 were complete and
have been archived**; **2 are active but had stale status headers** (left for
the owner to update, per request); **2 remain active with no change**; **3 are
living backlog/triage docs** that need no action.

Documentation health is **strong**: shipped grapevine hardening tranches and the
glamour-v2 rebuild had simply not been moved out of the active tree yet. After
this pass, `docs/projects/` reflects live work.

## Scope

- **Document types:** project proposals, plans, design docs, and reports under
  `docs/projects/*` (excluding `_archive`, `TEMPLATES`, `README`).
- **Method:** one `docs-curator` agent per document, each validating the doc
  against the codebase (`plugins/spellbook/skills/*`), git history, and tests.
- **Date range of source work:** ~2026-05-29 → 2026-06-27.
